title: HONG PAI IN THUPA NAMKIM NAK

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nong huhna tawh hih ciang kong tung
Lung muang in inn hong tung ing
A si manpha tawh hong tan khia

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na hehpihna’n hong khih in la
Topa kong vak san dekzel hi
Ka it Pasian hong kem in
Nang aa ding na ciamteh in.
